message:
test(workflows/runner): add 6 tests for wait helper functions (3503a151)

Cover the cx-cancellation wait helpers added in commit 3503a151 that
had zero test coverage:
- workflow_wait_aborted error message formatting
- wait_duration_maybe_cx with cx=None (completes normally)
- wait_duration_maybe_cx with Duration::ZERO (returns immediately)
- wait_condition_pause_maybe_cx dispatching Sleep, PaneIdle, StableTail

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
